prose: Fukui reactivity indices for aniline computed at DFT, tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals, no density fitting), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, using PySCF via the chemkit fukui-reactivity skill. Partial charges via Mulliken (PySCF). N±1 states: cation (charge +1, mult 2), anion (charge −1, mult 2). Geometry taken from the supplied aniline.xyz without re-optimization. Convergence: status ok, trustworthy true. Integrity checks: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (ok: true), sum(f-) = 1.0000 (ok: true). No engine warnings. Headline result (most electrophilic site): Atom 3 (C), f+ = 2.2975867. Most nucleophilic site: Atom 1 (N), f- = 0.20452359. CLI: cli.py fukui aniline.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1. Output: aniline_fukui_dft.json. Plot: agent_call_01_plot.png.
